summary: Implement Fabric v2.0 MCP-First Fortified from scratch in the pcf greenfield repo: pnpm monorepo (3 packages: server, cli, shared) + MCP stdio server (3 tools: fab_get_rules/fab_append_intent/fab_update_registry) + fab CLI (5 subcommands) + 6-client config generation + pre-commit triple (sync-meta/human-lint/ledger-append) + revision_hash stale detection + 6 bootstrap templates + werewolf-minigame-stub inner fixture + dual-track E2E + roadmap doc. 7-day MVP targeting Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Roo Code, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI.
approach: Follow the locked 7-day MVP plan from brainstorm synthesis exactly. TASK-001 (Day 0-1) establishes the monorepo foundation; TASK-002 (6-client config) and TASK-003 (fab CLI) proceed in parallel from that foundation; TASK-004 (pre-commit) builds on TASK-003; TASK-005 (revision_hash) builds on TASK-001 independently; TASK-006 (bootstrap+stub+DevMode) merges TASK-003+TASK-005; TASK-007 (E2E) validates all prior work; TASK-008 (roadmap doc) is independent and can be done any time. All implementation is greenfield — only 思路.md exists and must not be modified.
estimated_time: 7 days (40-60 hours total: Day 0-1 repo init, Day 2 6-client config, Day 3 CLI commands, Day 4 pre-commit, Day 5 revision_hash, Day 6 bootstrap+stub, Day 7 E2E)

design_decisions.rationale: Clean separation of MCP server from CLI tool; locked in synthesis.json
design_decisions.tradeoff: Slightly more setup complexity vs single-package but enables independent versioning

design_decisions.decision: stdio MCP transport (not HTTP) as primary
design_decisions.rationale: All 6 target clients support stdio; lowest latency for local use; HTTP only as KS-2 fallback if latency > 2s
design_decisions.tradeoff: stdio requires strict stdout discipline (enforced by lefthook); HTTP would be more debuggable

design_decisions.decision: git pre-commit as sole enforcement layer (not client hooks)
design_decisions.rationale: 3/6 target clients have hooks, 3 do not; git pre-commit is universal and cross-client; locked in synthesis.json
design_decisions.tradeoff: Requires husky/lefthook setup; developers can bypass with --no-verify (documented as unsupported)

design_decisions.decision: revision_hash cursor on fab_get_rules (not server push)
design_decisions.rationale: MCP protocol is request-response only; server push not available in 2026-04 MCP spec; parked in synthesis.json
design_decisions.tradeoff: Client must re-call on stale response; 2 round trips vs 1 on cache miss

design_decisions.decision: fab init generates TODO-marker scaffold, never AI-guesses content
design_decisions.rationale: Nx-style scaffolding; human docs are the source of truth; AI must not invent constraints
design_decisions.tradeoff: More work for first-time users (must fill in TODOs) but prevents hallucinated constraints

design_decisions.rationale: Correctness of generated TOML; schema compliance with ~/.codex/config.toml; explicitly required by handoff spec
design_decisions.tradeoff: Additional dependency but correctness is non-negotiable

design_decisions.decision: Dual-track E2E: inner stub + outer real-werewolf-minigame (READ-ONLY)
design_decisions.rationale: Inner track is reproducible and safe; outer track validates real-world Cocos Creator scale
design_decisions.tradeoff: Outer track requires manual testing against real project; not automatable

design_decisions.decision: GitHub Copilot explicitly excluded from target clients
design_decisions.rationale: Copilot MCP not GA in 2026-04; locked decision in synthesis.json; Copilot users use .github/copilot-instructions.md independently
design_decisions.tradeoff: Excludes Copilot users from Fabric v2.0 benefits; addressed in v1.1 roadmap (TASK-008)

data_flow.diagram: AGENTS.md tree → fab sync-meta → .fabric/agents.meta.json → fab_get_rules (MCP) → AI clients | git staged diff → fab ledger-append → .intent-ledger.jsonl | @HUMAN sections → .fabric/human-lock.json → fab human-lint → pre-commit block

stages.output: .fabric/agents.meta.json with updated node hashes + revision; .fabric/human-lock.json for @HUMAN sections
{ revision_hash, stale, rules: { L0, L1, L2, human_locked_nearby } }

stages.input: Current file content at @HUMAN section lines
stages.output: Exit 0 (pass) or Exit 1 with violation report

completeness.notes: All 7 implementation_scope items mapped to tasks (Day 6-7 split into TASK-006 + TASK-007 as specified); v1.1 roadmap captured in TASK-008

task_granularity.notes: Each task maps to 1 day of work (4-12 hours); TASK-007 (E2E) is validation-heavy but scoped appropriately

dependencies.notes: No circular deps; TASK-001 is root; TASK-002/003 fork from 001; TASK-004 chains from 003; TASK-005 forks from 001; TASK-006 merges 003+005; TASK-007 chains from 006; TASK-008 independent

convergence_criteria.notes: All criteria are quantified and testable; examples: '3 tools visible in inspector', '<300ms pre-commit', '>=60% fab_get_rules call rate', '<10s fab scan on real project'

implementation_steps.notes: All tasks have 6-8 implementation steps; TASK-007 has 6 steps (minimum 2 required)

constraint_compliance.notes: All constraints from handoff spec honored: never write to stdout in server, @iarna/toml for Codex, READ-ONLY real project, <300ms pre-commit, 7-day MVP timebox, v1.1 deferred
